action.reasoning: Observation: iteration 15 DART model achieved test IC 0.0558, rank_IC 0.0553, but still overfits (val IC 0.0825). Analysis: Ensemble of multiple LightGBM models with different configurations often improves generalization and can reduce overfitting. Additionally, we can train on more data (2008–2021) by using a recent validation period for early stopping, thereby benefiting from more recent patterns. Decision: modify train.py to train two LightGBM models (DART and GBDT) on expanded data (train 2008-01-01 to 2021-10-31, validation 2021-11-01 to 2021-12-31), and save both models. Update predict.py to average predictions from all model files in the checkpoint directory. Estimated training time ~100 minutes, well within the remaining 2.79 hours.
